hero.title: Data Analytics & Visualization
hero.subtitle: Turn data into insight. Drive decisions.
hero.description: Transform data into visual insights to support smarter business decisions.

overview.title: Analytics & Visualization Services
overview.p1: We deliver end-to-end services from data collection, cleaning, analysis to visualization. With advanced tools and techniques, we build interactive dashboards and reporting systems that extract real value from your data.
overview.p2: Expertise in Python, R, Tableau, Power BI and ECharts. We provide data-warehouse buildout, enterprise BI systems and real-time dashboards to make data truly drive growth.

data_engineering.title: Data Engineering
data_engineering.intro: Build a complete data processing pipeline.
